## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content workflow automation and management strategies between two GrowthX team members.](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Carrie uses Airtable extensively for content pipeline management, with custom automations for efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Workload varies significantly between clients; managing 40-hour weeks requires strategic automation and trust in CMs](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [AI tools (Claude, Atlas assistant) are leveraged for editing and fact-checking to save time](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
  - [Regular communication and setting clear expectations with clients is crucial for managing workload](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

## Topics

### Airtable Automation Strategies

  - [Carrie uses Airtable for content calendars, avoiding date-based systems](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Custom interfaces created for clients, showing only relevant information](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Automations set up for Slack notifications, email updates, and weekly content status changes](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating a "superpower" feeling for users through efficient, detailed setups](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)

### Workload Management

  - [Carrie manages 3 clients, with one requiring up to 100 content pieces weekly](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Typically maintains a 40-hour work week through strategic automation and delegation](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Monday/Friday used for weekly planning and wrap-up](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Tuesdays often busiest with writer interactions; client meetings usually Wed/Thurs](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Does not read every word of content; uses targeted checking and AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Trusts experienced CMs to handle most quality control](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Uses Claude and Atlas AI assistant for editing and fact-checking support](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Adapts review depth based on client needs and content complexity](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

### Client Management

  - [Varies approach based on client preferences (e.g., SEO-focused vs. collaborative topic selection)](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Works to build client trust to reduce need for extensive reviews](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Uses automated reminders and updates to keep clients informed without manual effort](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Admits to challenges with in-depth reporting](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Uses Claude to analyze Looker dashboard PDFs for insights](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=908.0)
  - [Suggests focusing on "early signals" for new blogs (e.g., indexing, initial keyword rankings)](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)

### Team Collaboration

  - [Noted isolation in remote work environment at GrowthX compared to previous experiences](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Suggested connecting with other team members (e.g., Jessalyn) to share strategies and challenges](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of open communication about workload and efficiency strategies](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bailey to connect with Jessalyn to discuss workload management strategies](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1810.0)
  - [Explore setting up Airtable automations to improve workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Consider implementing AI-assisted editing and fact-checking processes](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
  - [Review current client communication methods and implement automated updates where beneficial](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [Assess current reporting processes and explore ways to streamline using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/i2ceysQQAxTuSSjxBop5aYpzB_mLy8Em?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
